name: SapBw4HanaPipeline
description: This Test Connection validates access against the SAP BW/4HANA ABAP catalog tables and basic metadata extraction of Process Chains.

steps.name: CheckAccess
steps.description: Validate that we can connect to the underlying SAP HANA database and authenticate with the given credentials.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to connect to SAP HANA. Please validate the host, port, username, and password.

steps.name: GetProcessChains
steps.description: List Process Chains from the RSPCCHAIN table. Process Chains are the ETL orchestration mechanism in BW/4HANA that sequence Data Transfer Processes (mapped to Pipelines in OpenMetadata).
steps.errorMessage: Failed to fetch Process Chains from RSPCCHAIN. Please validate that the ABAP schema is correct and the user has SELECT privilege on BW catalog tables.
